title: pomaderris betulina
intro: Pomaderris betulina, also known as Yellow Gum, is a shrub native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its yellow flowers and distinctive bark. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pomaderris betulina include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of Pomaderris betulina include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
